response:
Yes, Tionne Watkins and Park So-yeon have both been members of a girl group. 

- **Tionne Watkins** was a member of the American girl group **TLC**, which was formed in 1990. She was part of the original line-up along with Lisa "Left Eye" Lopes and Rozonda "Chilli" Thomas.
- **Park So-yeon** was a member of the South Korean girl group **T-ara**, which she led as the main vocalist and member.

Thus, both have been members of girl groups.
